Terms & Conditions
1. Prices mentioned above are inclusive of GST.
2. Delivery will be completed within 3 working days from the date of confirmation.
3. Installation and basic configuration support will be provided.
4. Warranty will be as per manufacturer terms.
5. Payment Terms: 50% Advance and balance upon delivery/installment.
6. Quotation validity: 15 days from the date of issue.
We hope the above quotation meets your requirements and look forward to your positive response.
Bank Details:
Harsha Perfect Solutions (OPC) Pvt Ltd

- Bank: HDFC Bank, Visakhapatnam
- IFSC: HDFC0001243
From,
Dr. P. Satheesh

exam_tips: Review key concepts daily in the week before your exam.
Focus extra time on: Client, Total, Terms.
Practice active recall instead of passive re-reading.
common_mistakes: Not practicing with quiz questions before the exam.
memory_techniques: Teach the material to someone else to reinforce memory.
